title: Realistic Pillagers
description: Replaces Pillagers with masked, human-like bandits.
body:
## Realistic Pillagers

No more grey-faced mobs — Pillagers are now masked bandits.

This pack gives raiders a more human and immersive look by replacing their appearance with yellow-skinned outlaws wearing bandit masks.

### Features
- Reworked Pillager texture
- Masked bandit style
- Cleaner and more immersive visuals

### Compatibility
- Minecraft all version
- Works without mods

### Usage
- Free for personal use
- Please give credit when used in videos or showcases
